name: Liberty Savings Federal Credit Union
description_short: Federal credit union offering savings accounts, auto loans, personal loans, home equity lines, and Visa credit cards with competitive member rates and low fees.
description_long: Liberty Savings Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution celebrating its 75th anniversary. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates on a cooperative model where members are owners rather than customers of a for-profit corporation. The organization reinvests profits back to members through competitive loan rates and superior service offerings. The credit union provides a comprehensive suite of financial products including savings accounts, auto loans (from 5.50% APR), unsecured personal loans (from 10.00% APR), Visa credit cards (from 11.00% APR), and home equity lines of credit (from 5.75% APR). Members gain access to online banking, a mobile app for account management and mobile check deposit, ATM networks, and branches across multiple locations. The institution emphasizes member-only rates and competitive terms across all lending products. Liberty Savings distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, which eliminates stockholder profit extraction and allows returns to flow to members. The organization actively invests in member financial education through free financial wellness courses and seminars covering homebuying, auto purchase, and loan preparation. They also demonstrate community commitment through scholarship programs for Hudson County high school students ($500 per school). The credit union is best suited for individuals seeking traditional banking services with a focus on competitive rates and member ownership. However, potential members should note that membership eligibility and specific service availability depend on meeting credit union field of membership requirements, which are not detailed on the publicly available website. The organization operates with standard banking hours and branch closures for member meetings.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.50% APR with member-only pricing
Unsecured personal loans starting at 10.00% APR with competitive terms
Home equity lines of credit from 5.75% APR for property-based borrowing
Visa credit cards with fraud protection, zero fraud liability, and travel insurance at 11.00% APR
Mobile app enabling check deposit, fund transfers, balance viewing, and alert setup
Free financial wellness courses and seminars for members on homebuying, auto loans, and budgeting
Member-owned cooperative structure returning profits to members rather than external shareholders
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or field of membership restrictions
No information provided about savings account interest rates, CD rates, or deposit products
Limited details on personal loan amounts, terms, or qualification requirements beyond rate disclosure
Annual meeting closure at 2PM affects branch access for members on 4/15, requiring advance planning
Website lacks transparency on monthly fees, minimum balance requirements, or account maintenance costs
best_for: Credit union members seeking competitive auto and home equity loan rates with low fees
Individuals wanting to join a member-owned financial institution with transparent ownership structure
Consumers looking for comprehensive financial wellness education and community-focused banking
People refinancing auto loans or consolidating debt through unsecured personal loans
diagnosis: Liberty Savings Federal Credit Union is best for individuals who value member ownership, competitive rates on loans, and personalized financial education within a traditional credit union framework. The main caveat is that membership eligibility depends on field of membership requirements not disclosed on the website, so prospective members must verify they qualify before applying online.
services: Auto loans with rates from 5.50% APR
Visa credit cards from 11.00% APR with fraud protection and travel insurance
Home equity lines of credit from 5.75% APR
Online banking platform with account management features
Mobile app with check deposit, fund transfers, and balance checking
Free financial wellness courses and seminars
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
